catlabPos.name: Catlab POS
catlabPos.problem: C&T Lab coffee shop chain required a centralized POS checkout system across multiple retail sites, requiring order syncing and transaction analytics.
catlabPos.role: Full-stack Engineer: Architected PostgreSQL database model, integrated receipt printing APIs, and built the real-time order cashier frontend.
catlabPos.challenges: Implementing robust offline support so checkouts function during internet drops, and auto-syncing local cached sales queues on connection restoration.
catlabPos.outcome: Successfully deployed across two retail branches, securely processing 200+ daily checkouts with 99.9% uptime analytics sync.

lifestyleEcosystem.name: Lifestyle Ecosystem
lifestyleEcosystem.problem: Designed to address fragmented user productivity apps by consolidating habit trackers, financial planners, and daily agendas into one unified platform.
lifestyleEcosystem.role: Sole Frontend Architect & UI Designer: Engineered the central state machine using Zustand and built customizable dashboard widget blocks.
lifestyleEcosystem.challenges: Optimizing canvas analytics rendering and synchronizing local data stores without bloating the document object model (DOM) count.
lifestyleEcosystem.outcome: Created a clean productivity interface with responsive widget placement, dynamic financial analytics, and responsive desktop layout.

stopCheck.name: Stop Check
stopCheck.problem: An auto diagnostic and tuning service needed an interactive modern landing layout to describe services, compute pricing, and capture booking requests.
stopCheck.role: Sole Frontend Developer: Developed customized SCSS styles with BEM rules and implemented pricing calculators.
stopCheck.challenges: Crafting custom SVG diagnostic circuit animations that run at 60fps across low-performance mobile devices.
stopCheck.outcome: Launched in production, reducing booking capture drops and increasing customer inquiries.

admin.name: Admin Panel
admin.problem: Indulgence mobile application administrators lacked a central system to moderate user reports, publish content, and view daily usage telemetry.
admin.role: Frontend Developer: Built the complete authentication layout and configured Axios interceptors for automatic session token refresh.
admin.challenges: Designing security layers to prevent token leakage and handling high-frequency telemetry charts rendering efficiently.
admin.outcome: Delivered a fully integrated admin dashboard running secure content moderation tools with direct backend database links.

serviceApp.name: Service App
serviceApp.problem: Explored clean interface patterns for subscription-based products, focusing on payment portals, member settings, and transaction feeds.
serviceApp.role: Frontend Developer: Implemented user profile controls, simulated checkout pages, and organized global state using React Context.
serviceApp.challenges: Securing page routing rules using client-side auth state validation triggers.
serviceApp.outcome: Formed a reusable UI starter kit detailing fluid navigation schemas and premium profile customization dashboards.

indulgence.name: Indulgence
indulgence.problem: The Indulgence mobile application team required a high-converting single-page landing site to showcase features and link app stores.
indulgence.role: Lead Web Developer: Wrote clean semantic markup and styled interactive features sections.
indulgence.challenges: Achieving fast initial page load metrics and implementing scroll-triggered animations without layout shifts.
indulgence.outcome: Produced a lightweight static showcase landing page with optimized images, landing perfect PageSpeed scores.

indaapp.name: IndaApp
indaapp.problem: IndaApp agency requested a minimalist corporate portfolio website to showcase their B2B digital transformation services.
indaapp.role: Lead Frontend Developer: Translated design system guidelines into modular stylesheet templates.
indaapp.challenges: Constructing fully responsive media grids that behave identically across old Safari browsers and modern mobile viewports.
indaapp.outcome: Successfully launched corporate branding landing page driving business leads.

pokemonGame.name: Pokemon
pokemonGame.problem: A personal challenge to construct an interactive turn-based browser battle simulator fetching PokeAPI properties.
pokemonGame.role: Sole Developer: Coded the core battle calculations, animated health bar tracking, and Redux Toolkit state flow.
pokemonGame.challenges: Animating game attack sequences and resolving asynchronous asset pre-loading to ensure sound/sprite alignment.
pokemonGame.outcome: Built a fully functional battle game highlighting interactive sprite battles and state-driven game menus.

weatherForecast.name: Weather Forecast
weatherForecast.problem: A simple training build to showcase clean, minimalist weather tracking using geolocation search lookups.
weatherForecast.role: Sole Developer: Designed the UI layouts, coded search parameters, and integrated geolocation weather checks.
weatherForecast.challenges: Parsing weather data formats from JSON responses and translating code results dynamically into custom meteorological sky states.
weatherForecast.outcome: Delivered a lightweight weather app using native Geolocation APIs.

uiLibrary.name: UI Library
uiLibrary.problem: Every new project required rebuilding the same UI primitives from scratch — buttons, inputs, modals, cards — introducing inconsistency and wasted dev time.
uiLibrary.role: Sole Author: Designed the component API, built each primitive with composability and theme-agnosticism in mind, and documented usage patterns.
uiLibrary.challenges: Keeping components truly flexible and reusable across projects without coupling them to specific design systems or business logic.
uiLibrary.outcome: A shared component library published on GitHub, providing a consistent visual language and rapid UI scaffolding for future projects.

myPersFinBot.name: MyPersFinBot
myPersFinBot.problem: Tracking personal income, expenses, and savings manually across spreadsheets was tedious, error-prone, and offered no quick summaries.
myPersFinBot.role: Sole Developer: Designed the conversation flow, implemented expense categorisation logic, built SQLite persistence, and integrated the Telegram Bot API.
myPersFinBot.challenges: Crafting an intuitive, command-driven UX within the tight constraints of Telegram's chat interface without overwhelming the user.
myPersFinBot.outcome: A fully functioning personal finance app running live on Telegram — actively tracking real transactions, categorising spending, and delivering automated weekly summary reports in daily use.

tgWrapper.name: TGWrapper
tgWrapper.problem: Building Telegram bots with the raw Bot API requires repetitive boilerplate for polling, routing, and error handling — slowing down development.
tgWrapper.role: Sole Author: Designed the wrapper API surface, wrote the core routing and polling engine, authored documentation, and published to npm.
tgWrapper.challenges: Abstracting the full complexity of the Telegram Bot API into a minimal, ergonomic interface while retaining escape hatches for advanced use cases.
tgWrapper.outcome: Published as @jilimb0/tgwrapper on npm — an open-source package enabling developers to launch Telegram bots with a few lines of JavaScript.
